name: AI Agents
description: The convergence of artificial intelligence and blockchain technology. Focuses on autonomous agents, decentralized compute, and AI-driven market makers.
insights: AI sector continues to dominate DEX volume. Autonomous agent protocols are seeing 40% WoW growth in TVL.

name: Real World Assets (RWA)
description: Tokenization of tangible assets like real estate, bonds, and credit. Bringing off-chain liquidity to the blockchain.
insights: Institutional interest in tokenized treasuries is at an all-time high. BlackRock BUIDL fund success is a major catalyst.

name: DePIN
description: Decentralized Physical Infrastructure Networks. Using crypto-incentives to build real-world infrastructure like Wi-Fi, 5G, and GPU clouds.
insights: GPU shortage is driving massive demand for decentralized compute networks.
